ocr.text: The Lease Expiry Schedule presented in this report highlights the strategic planning and financial health of Digital Realty Trust
as it navigates the competitive landscape of the real estate and REIT sectors. By analyzing the metrics provided, stakeholders
can gain insights into the timing of lease expirations and their impact on overall rental income and asset management. Notably,
the Total Area occupied is 1.7 million square feet, illustrating the scale of operations and the potential for revenue generation.

TotalLeases  850  4.5years  20  [HIDDEN]  5.5%  24.0  1.4  8.9  700  110  [HIDDEN]
TotalRevenue($M)  900  TotalExpenses($M)  400  NetOperatingIncome($M)  500  CashFlow($M)  450  OccupancyRate(%)  95%  AvgRentpersqft  $25
The Rental Income is a critical metric, with a projection of $9.5 million reflecting the company's ability to maintain a robust
portfolio. Furthermore, the Debt/Equity ratio is an essential indicator of financial stability, currently standing at 850, which
allows for an assessment of leverage in relation to equity. The report also indicates that, as of 2022, Total Leases had a renewal
rate of 92%, showcasing effective lease management strategies. In terms of historical performance, Total Leases had an average
duration of 4.5 years as of 2020, while expectations for the coming years include a significant increase in Net Income, projected
at $4.1 million. The 2021 lease expirations are expected to contribute $25 million in revenue, which will further enhance the
company's financial position. Overall, this schedule serves as a valuable tool for understanding the implications of lease
expirations on future income and operational strategies.
